chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 2169 of 2020 along with C.P Nos. 2169, 2184, 2449 & 2536 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 11.02.2026 Mr. Abbas Talha, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Salahuddin Ahmed, Advocate for Petitioner in CP No. D- 2449 of 2020. Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mahar, AAG. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. Dr. Liaquat Ali Abro and Nadeem Ahmed Qureshi, Law Officers, Law Department, Government of Sindh. ---------- These Petitions seeking extension of a financial assistance to legal practitioners were filed at a point in time when the COVID-19 pandemic was prevalent. Subsequent events have since overtaken the matter as the pandemic has long since passed. The Petitions stand dismissed accordingly. Office to place a copy of this Order in the connected Petition listed above. Judge Judge Ayaz
